merged_events.event_description: The U.S. government established a consulate in Juba (the capital) following the signing of the Comprehensive Peace Agreement.

evidence.quote: After the signing of the Comprehensive Peace Agreement in 2005, the U.S. government established a consulate in Juba on November 11, 2005, to reinforce its partnership with the South Sudanese people.

merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Consulate General in Juba was elevated to a U.S. Embassy upon South Sudan's declaration of independence and U.S. recognition of the new state.

evidence.quote: Following its declaration of independence, the United States established full diplomatic relations with the Republic of South Sudan, upgrading the U.S. Consulate General in Juba to a U.S. Embassy on July 9, 2011.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (2005-11-11) and status (Consulate). RDCR confirms establishment of consulate in Juba following the Comprehensive Peace Agreement.
Exact match on date (2011-07-09) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms elevation of Consulate General to Embassy upon South Sudan's independence and U.S. recognition.
